purpose: Read-only measurement tool that validates Anarchy narrative register and Arc record structure against the carried narrative schema shape. Its job is author-time and checkpoint-time conformance measurement: it reports where JSON is syntactically valid but structurally non-conformant, without authoring records, blocking execution, or mutating repo files.

workspace_root.description: Workspace root to inspect. The tool only reads narrative surfaces under this root.

record_paths.description: Optional repo-relative or absolute narrative record paths to check. When omitted, all discovered project records are checked.

validation_scope.description: Which narrative surfaces to validate. Defaults to all.

validation_state.description: Conformance state. non_conformant means at least one narrative surface parsed as JSON but did not match the carried narrative shape.

checked_surfaces.description: Surfaces inspected. Each entry includes path, surface_type, presence_state, and json_state.

findings.description: Structural findings with severity, rule_id, file_path, json_path, observed_state, and suggested_correction.

structural_grounding.description: Measurement-first grounding label for the validation output. This is provenance and terrain, not refusal or authority.

recommended_next_actions.description: Advisory corrections or re-measurement steps. These are terrain suggestions, not commands.

structural_grounding_requirement.output_behavior: non_blocking_measurement_label; tools always run and label grounding rather than refusing execution
structural_grounding_requirement.description: validate_narrative_arc_state measures narrative conformance and remains callable even when narrative surfaces are missing or partial.
